title: Glasseam Christmas Candle Holder Glass: Set of 3 Tea Light Candle Holders Decorative Christmas Tea Light Holders with Red Berry and Snow Pinecone Votive Candle Holder for Table Centrepieces Party Gift
features: Christmas Candle Holders: These tealight holders feature a unique and charming design that captures the essence of the holiday season. The bowl-shaped glass candle holder resembles a miniature snow scene Christmas ball, inside with lifelike artificial red berries, pine needles, pine cones, and small foam balls. This exquisite decorative piece will add a touch of Christmas magic to your home.

Lovely Tealight Holders: There bowl tea light holders glass Diameter: 3.15"/ 8cm, Height: 2.56"/ 6.5cm, Inner Diameter: 1.65"/ 4.2cm; Perfectly suited for tea candles, flameless candles and mini votive candles. Illuminate your space with the soft, warm glow of your favourite candles.

DIY Unique Tea Light Holder: Each set includes artificial red berries, pine needles, pine cones, and mini foam balls. You can arrange these elements according to your personal preference, allowing you to decorate a miniature Christmas snow scene and create your own unique holiday style. It's a fun way to add a personal touch to your Christmas decorations and holiday decor.

Multifunctional Glass Candle Holders: Our Christmas table decorations are not just for candles—they're a versatile addition to any holiday decor setup. Whether placed on your dining table, kitchen, fireplace mantel, or bookshelf, they instantly brighten your space and set the mood for holiday banquets and festive parties. They also make thoughtful gifts or charming favours for a range of celebrations, from festivals to birthdays, baby showers, and anniversaries.

Glasseam Glass Tealight Holder for Your Satisfaction: Engaged in glassware for years, Glasseam aims to provide you with a tealight candle holders in perfect condition with customized packaging. Please tell us if you are unsatisfied with the item for any reason. We are always listening, and will provide the best and the most professional customer service for you.
